title: Fix hierarchical compilation with nested -F (#5114)
body:
Fix for #5114 

The test fails later:

```
bin/verilator -f obj_vlt/t_hier_trace/Vdetail_code__hierMkArgs.f
%Warning-MODDUP: t/t_hier_trace_sub/t_hier_trace_sub.v:12:8: Duplicate declaration of module: 'sub_top'
   12 | module sub_top(
      |        ^~~~~~~
                 t/t_hier_trace_sub/t_hier_trace_sub.v:12:8: ... Location of original declaration
   12 | module sub_top(
      |        ^~~~~~~
                 ... For warning description see https://verilator.org/warn/MODDUP?v=5.025
                 ... Use "/* verilator lint_off MODDUP */" and lint_on around source to disable this message.
%Error: Exiting due to 1 warning(s)
make[1]: *** [obj_vlt/t_hier_trace/Vt_hier_trace_hier.mk:32: hier_launch_verilator] Error 1
```
code_blocks:
bin/verilator -f obj_vlt/t_hier_trace/Vdetail_code__hierMkArgs.f

                 t/t_hier_trace_sub/t_hier_trace_sub.v:12:8: ... Location of original declaration
   12 | module sub_top(
      |        ^~~~~~~
                 ... For warning description see https://verilator.org/warn/MODDUP?v=5.025
                 ... Use "/* verilator lint_off MODDUP */" and lint_on around source to disable this message.
%Error: Exiting due to 1 warning(s)
make[1]: *** [obj_vlt/t_hier_trace/Vt_hier_trace_hier.mk:32: hier_launch_verilator] Error 1
